writing_guidelines.main_body_strategy: Tight writing. AAAI has stricter page limits than NeurIPS/ICML. Every paragraph must earn its space.
writing_guidelines.figure_strategy: Minimize figures in main body due to space constraints. Place less critical figures in appendix.
writing_guidelines.table_strategy: Compact tables. Consider combining related results.
writing_guidelines.proof_strategy: Formal proofs preferred. Move lengthy proofs to appendix (max 2 extra pages).

common_pitfalls: Exceeding 7+1+2 page limit (7 main + 1 references + 2 appendix)
Using Times New Roman alternatives not accepted by AAAI
